templates.title: Templates Library
templates.subtitle: Manage and organize your document templates.
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Create your first document template to get started.
templates.deleteTemplateDesc: This cannot be undone. All data will be lost.
templates.deleteFailed: Failed to delete template. Please try again.
templates.previewNote: Preview shows rendered template content with placeholder tokens visible.
templates.previewNotSupported: Rich preview is not supported for binary .docx templates. Generate a document to see the final result.
templates.orBrowse: or click to browse — .docx files only
templates.scanExistingDesc: I already typed {field_name} in Word. Detect them.
templates.addFieldsAppDesc: My .docx is clean. Let me insert the markers here.
templates.selectBlockDesc: Select a block to add or manage field markers
templates.highlightHint: Highlight text above to quickly fill "Text to replace"
templates.pasteToFind: Paste or type text to find
templates.startAddingFields: Select any block on the left to start adding data fields
templates.readyChoose: Ready — choose how to add fields
templates.errFailedToRead: Failed to read file. Please try again.
templates.errNoMarkersPathA: No {field} markers found in this document. Either type them in Word first, or use Path B to add them here.
templates.errAddOneField: Please add at least one field before continuing.
templates.errFailedToInject: Failed to inject fields. Please try again.
templates.errFieldRequired: At least one field is required
templates.errFailedToSave: Failed to save template. Please try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: View and print all generated documents.
documents.noDocumentsDesc: Click "New Document" to generate your first document.
documents.noTemplatesWarning: You need at least one template to generate documents.
documents.editLoadFailed: Failed to load document for editing.
documents.noHtmlVersion: This template has no HTML version. Please edit and save the template manually once to enable PDF printing.
documents.printFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
documents.downloadFailed: Failed to download document. Please try again.
documents.errNoDocx: Template has no .docx file attached. Please re-upload the template.
documents.errGenParams: Generation failed. Check that all field names in your .docx match exactly.
documents.errSaveRecord: Could not save document record, but your file was generated. Please download it.
documents.docNamePlaceholder: e.g. Report Card — John Doe — Term 1
documents.noFieldsFound: No fields found in this template.
documents.editToAddFields: Edit the template to add fields.
documents.reviewPmt: Review the document below before downloading
documents.generateToStart: Generate a document from a template to get started.

teachers.title: Teacher Management
teachers.subtitle: Upload approved teachers and manage invitations
teachers.dropCSVDesc: One email per row, or comma-separated
teachers.inviteBody1:
Hello,

You have been invited as a teacher to
teachers.inviteBody2:
on the PADocs platform.

Please click on the link below to activate your account:
teachers.inviteBody3:
The link expires in 72 hours.

If you were not expecting an invitation, you can simply ignore this email.

Regards,
The PADocs Team

landing.heroSubtitle: PADocs helps schools and organizations generate professional documents automatically from reusable templates.
landing.feature1Desc: Manage all your document templates in one organized library.
landing.feature2Desc: Generate documents automatically by filling data into templates.
landing.feature3Desc: Full French and English interface support built in.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of organizations saving time with PADocs.
